memory-extractor.description: Extracts and consolidates memory from conversation history

coordinator.description: Decomposes complex tasks and delegates to specialized sub-agents

reviewer.description: Code review and quality analysis agent

memory.template: List all stored memories using the list_memories tool. If the user provides arguments, search for matching memories. Show a summary with memory types (user/feedback/project/reference) and their descriptions. User input: $ARGUMENTS

remember.template: Save the following information as a persistent memory using the save_memory tool. Determine the appropriate type (user/feedback/project/reference) based on content. Create a short kebab-case name and one-line description. Content to remember: $ARGUMENTS

forget.description: Delete a memory by name or topic
forget.template: Delete the memory matching the following pattern using the delete_memory tool. Pattern: $ARGUMENTS

screenshot.template: Take a screenshot of the desktop using the desktop_screenshot tool. If the user specifies a region, capture that region. Analyze the screenshot and describe what you see. User input: $ARGUMENTS

desktop.template: You have Computer Use capabilities. The user wants to perform a desktop operation. Use the appropriate desktop tools (desktop_click, desktop_type, desktop_key, desktop_scroll, desktop_screenshot, desktop_list_apps) to fulfill the request. First take a screenshot to see the current state, then perform the requested action. User request: $ARGUMENTS

im.template: Check IM bridge status using the im_status tool. If the user wants to send a message, use the im_send tool with the specified platform (telegram/feishu/dingtalk). User input: $ARGUMENTS

coordinate.template: Break down the following task into subtasks and execute them using the Task tool with appropriate sub-agents (coder, reviewer). Run independent tasks in parallel. Task: $ARGUMENTS

review.description: Code review with the reviewer agent
review.template: Perform a thorough code review of the specified files or recent changes. Check for correctness, security, performance, readability, and conventions. Output issues in format: File:Line — Description (severity). Review target: $ARGUMENTS

settings.description: 打开设置面板，配置插件和功能
settings.template: 打开设置面板。使用 settings.show 命令导航到设置页面。用户输入: $ARGUMENTS
